title: Donate blood and save a life today
description: GEORGE NEWS - George Service Clubs (GSC) is...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - George Service Clubs (GSC) is hosting a blood drive this morning, Friday 31 January from 11:00 to 15:00.


> The drive will take place at their premises at 117A York Street (behind Dotsure) at Lyttelton Frail Care.


This is a great opportunity to give back to the community and help save lives.

Whether you're a first-time donor or a regular, every donation makes a difference.

To add your name to the list, please contact Angelique at 044 874 7494.

Bring your friends and family, and roll up your sleeves together to support this vital cause.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
